channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: How Macklin Celebrini helped this Pittsburgh Penguins rookie make the NHL
item.description: Pittsburgh Penguins rookie Ben Kindel skated with fellow Vancouver-area natives Macklin Celebrini and Connor Bedard this summer
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Verstappen earns easy US Grand Prix sprint win after McLaren title leaders crash out on 1st lap
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Red Bull's Max Verstappen cruised to an easy victory Saturday in a crash-filled United States Grand Prix sprint race that saw McLaren teammates and Formula 1 championship leaders Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris both knocked out in the first turn when their cars collided.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Why Warriors had to cut Seth Curry
item.description: The cap-strapped Warriors cutting Seth Curry, Steph Curry's younger brother, did not come as a surprise
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Boeser scores in 4th round of shootout to lift Canucks to 3-2 win over Blackhawks
item.description: Brock Boeser scored in the fourth round of the shootout and the Vancouver Canucks beat the Chicago Blackhawks 3-2 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Postecoglou fired, Haaland scores 2 more for Man City and Arsenal profits again from a corner
item.description: It took around 20 minutes for Nottingham Forest to fire manager Ange Postecoglou after losing to Chelsea 3-0 in the Premier League.
item.dc:creator: Steve Douglas, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Alex Ovechkin's first goal of the season brings him within 2 of the 900 mark for his career
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Alex Ovechkin's mini-drought is over. The countdown to another milestone can begin again. Ovechkin scored his first goal of the season Friday night, moving to within two of 900 for his career and helping the Washington Capitals to a 5-1 victory over the Minnesota Wild.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Larkin's overtime goal lifts Red Wings past Lightning, 2-1
item.description: Dylan Larkin scored on a breakaway 3:36 into overtime to give the Detroit Red Wings a 2-1 victory over the Tampa Bay Lightning on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Bill Belichick, Jordon Hudson's hot mic moment leaked amid UNC's drama-filled season
item.description: Leaked footage shows North Carolina coach Bill Belichick and his girlfriend, Jordon Hudson, criticizing a graphics team during the filming of his TV show last year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: OutKick attends Dodgers-sponsored awards show honoring trans swimmer Lia Thomas: Here's what happened
item.description: Ex-UPenn swimmer Lia Thomas took the stage in Los Angeles Thursday night to accept the “Voice of Inspiration Award" amid an ongoing debate surrounding fairness in women's sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Police prepare for BYU-Utah 'Holy War' game after threat made on social media
item.description: ABC4 spoke with Brigham Young University Police about security ahead of the "Holy War" rivalry game between the Utah Utes and BYU Cougars on Saturday. Concerns come in the wake of threats made against Utah students and the shooting of Charlie Kirk at Utah Valley University.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Dodgers 1 win away from making World Series after defeating Brewers in Game 3
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers are one win away from advancing to their second consecutive World Series after beating the Milwaukee Brewers 3-1 in Game 3 of the NLCS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Blue Jays' Max Scherzer refuses to leave mound in heated exchange with manager in Game 4 win
item.description: Toronto Blue Jays starting pitcher Max Scherzer let his manager, John Schneider, have it during a mound visit in the team's 8-2 win over the Seattle Mariners in Game 4 of the ALCS.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Athlete of the Week: State champion Hunter Simmons
item.description: Hunter Simmons wins KREX Xceptional Athlete of the Week after winning the state championship for Grand Junction golf.
item.dc:creator: Jackson Cowen, KREX 5

item.title: USD men's basketball on heels of new season; looks on to conference realignment in 2027
item.description: New faces, a new performance facility, and a brand new zest for the upcoming USD Men's Basketball season. Conference realignment in 2027 on the horizon as well.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: From watches to Lombardi trophies: The Glazer family legacy
item.description: News Channel 8's Aileen Hnatiuk reports on the Glazer family's humble beginnings and how they leveraged that into the dynasty Bucs fans know and love today.
item.dc:creator: Will Richardson, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Mammoth beat Calgary in home opener, 3-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - JJ Peterka and Barrett Hayton scored second-period goals, Karel Vejmelka made 19 saves, and the Utah Mammoth beat the Calgary Flames 3-1 on Wednesday night. Utah became the sixth NHL franchise to win each of its first two home openers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mammoth fans get creative for historic home opener
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - From dressing in full mammoth costumes, to looking like cavemen, Utah Mammoth fans got creative for their team's historic home opener Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: PHOTOS: Angel Reese becomes first pro athlete to walk in Victoria's Secret Fashion Show
item.description: Angel Reese took her game from the court to the catwalk and made history along the way. The Chicago Sky forward became the first professional athlete to walk in the Victoria’s Secret Fashion Show on Wednesday, joining the brand’s high-profile “Wings Reveal” lineup in New York.
item.dc:creator: JONATHAN LANDRUM Jr., Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mammoth players excited for home opener tonight
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It is a new era of NHL hockey in Utah. With its new name, logo, uniforms and merchandise, the Utah Mammoth will play its first home game tonight against Calgary. While fan excitement is off the charts, the players are feeling the new energy as well.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Scripps Ranch’s Winning Duo: Gardinera and Taylor Built More Than a Football Team
item.description: Scripps Ranch head football coach Marlon Gardinera and offensive coordinator John Taylor have led the team to multiple successes, including a 2021 CIF Division 2-A state championship, and Taylor will take over as head coach next year.
item.dc:creator: Gregory Spicer, Fox 5

item.title: Emotions run high for Utah-BYU rivalry game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The last time Utah played in Provo in 2021, BYU ended a nine-game losing streak in the rivalry series, and Cougars head coach Kalani Sitake could not hold his emotions back, stomping up and down the sideline.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Chychrun scores in OT to lift Capitals to 3-2 victory over Lightning for third straight win
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jakob Chychrun scored 1:19 into overtime and the Washington Capitals beat the Tampa Bay Lightning 3-2 on Tuesday night for their third straight win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: DJ Moore hospitalized with groin injury after Bears last-minute win in Washington
item.description: LANDOVER, Md. (WGN) — A thrilling victory for the Chicago Bears over the Washington Commanders on Monday night was overshadowed by news that star wide receiver DJ Moore was hospitalized after the game.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: BYU, Utah renew rivalry both as ranked teams
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It's rivalry week in the state of Utah. #15 BYU hosts #23 Utah this Saturday night at LaVell Edwards Stadium with Big 12 Championship Game ramifications.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Inside Michael Andretti's home listed for nearly $12 million
item.description: FISHERS, Ind. — The home of former Andretti Global owner and race car driver Michael Andretti is for sale. The 21,000-square-foot estate is situated on a 5.23-acre parcel of land that is located along the shores of Geist Reservoir in Fishers.
item.dc:creator: Austin Hanson, NewsNation

item.title: Mike Shildt retires as San Diego Padres manager
item.description: Mike Shildt informed the Padres organization Saturday that he is retiring as the club's manager, citing mental and physical toll, after leading San Diego to two consecutive 90-win seasons and playoff appearances.
item.dc:creator: Sharisse Cohee, Fox 5

item.title: Mahomes leads the Chiefs to a 30-17 victory over Lions, and a fistfight erupts at the finish
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Patrick Mahomes and the Kansas City Chiefs knew they were going to have a fight on their hands when the Detroit Lions, riding a four-game winning streak and a whole bunch of momentum, rolled into Arrowhead Stadium on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers All-Pro linebacker Fred Warner out for season following severe right ankle injury
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers lost another key player when All-Pro linebacker Fred Warner left Sunday's loss at Tampa Bay with a season-ending ankle injury. Warner dislocated and broke his right ankle when a couple players fell into him at the end of a first-quarter play.
item.dc:creator: FRED GOODALL, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: UK rapper Giggs takes center stage as NFL spices up international games with halftime shows
item.description: The NFL has been spicing up its international games with halftime performers, a bit like mini-Super Bowls
item.dc:creator: KEN MAGUIRE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utes storm past ASU, 42-10, roll into rivalry game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Devin Dampier only had to throw 12 passes Saturday night, as the Utes rushing attack steamrolled Arizona State Saturday night, 42-10, for its first ever Big 12 Conference victory at home. Devin Dampier ran for 120 yards and three touchdowns as Utah ran over No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
